data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design principle focusing on ease of interaction with UI elements based on their size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas for important actions, minimalistic design.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Methods to reduce user's decision time by minimizing choices.
data.technical_spec: Optimized search functionality and simple navigation.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design consistency with user expectations based on frequent browser behaviors.
data.technical_spec: Familiar UI patterns and search functionalities.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: User perception of more attractive designs being easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Clean interface with Google's minimalistic design roots.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: The limitation of human memory to handle about seven chunks of information.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined information display and task segregation.
